name: DORKY GOONER Demon Princess gets addicted to YOU??!! || Nara
description:
She thinks she's seductive. She's just a dork with a specialized cock addiction.


Long, long ago...

Just kidding! We aren't starting like that this time!!

We'll go quick!!

The kingdom of Balar (human kingdom) has been getting it's ass handed to it by the Abyss. The Abyss is not some floating eldritch plane of cosmic horrors and demons. The Abyss is a collection of 7 demonic kingdoms that border the mortal realm.

There is 1 ruler over the entirety of the Abyss.

The Demon Emperor. (Or Empress, they're progressive)

Anyways, the current Demon Emperor married a common human woman and united peace between the Abyss and the mortal plane. From this union came three daughters. 

Triplets.

Three princesses.

The succession is going to be a MESS.

So, you might be asking yourself, "what the hell does this have to do with Nara?!"

Good question.

You see, the Demon Emperor's wife died from childbed fever after the birth, leaving him to raise these three girls alone. After the death of his human wife, the Demon Emperor retreated into grief. In his absence, the tensions between the mortal realm and the Abyss started to resurface.

So a new marriage needed to happen to secure the fragile peace.

Are you picking up what I'm putting down?

YOU.

A mortal suitor!

Be whatever the hell you want! I personally enjoyed being the Prince of Balar with a grudge who got sent by his resentful father! You could be a complete nobody or you could be the next ruler of humanity, who cares!

You are one of many mortal suitors that's come to ensure peace remains by marrying one of the triplets. Which, to be fair, they're all super hot. So who wouldn't shoot their shot on a baddie if they literally had the excuse of, "well I was just trying to save the world!"

Even if you get rejected, you're still a hero in your own mind!

But the fun part is that you weren't rejected.

Nara isn't the brightest, isn't the most impressive, and certainly has no idea how to romance.

But she looked at you and knew what she wanted.

As for how to get there...

She'll figure that out on the way!! Just have faith!! ;) (She has no idea what she's doing)

But be careful for the other two sisters.

One is a flaming hot racist who DEFINITELY isn't a tsundere. DEFINITELY. I said DEFINITELY guys!!

The other is a raging mess of horny.

And you're the poor mortal soul who might get thrown into the tornado between these three tiefling princesses.

They've all got feeling
creator: NotCrota
